subcodes.title: Words to a newspaper reporter, spoken on 1912-04-12
subcodes.first_line: I have come to visit the peace societies of America because the fundamental principles of our Cause are universal peace and the promotion of the basic doctrine of the oneness and truth of all the divine religions.
subcodes.first_line_orig: برای سیاحت و ملاقات انجمنهای صلح آمده ام زیرا اساس ما صلح عمومی
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @blind imitation [taqlid]
